---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability, model, or analysis
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would this add, and to which series?**
F1, WEC, IMSA, or all three — and which layer (data ingestion, degradation
model, neutralisation model, simulator, audit).

**Why**
What question does this let the project answer that it can't today? Link to
a specific limitation in a `reports/*.md` "known limitations" section if this
closes one.

**Data availability**
Does the underlying source (FastF1, or the WEC/IMSA dataset) actually carry
what this needs? This project doesn't fabricate data to fill a gap — if the
source doesn't have it, say so here rather than assuming it can be added.

**Rough approach (optional)**
Any thoughts on implementation, or a similar existing phase this could follow
as a template.
